en: How much is the allowance?
10,000 a year.
The agreement between Bertie and me was that I would give up everything
ko: 버티와 나의 합의는 내가 모든 것을 포기하고

en: and go into exile and keep a low profile in return for a pension
ko: 망명하며 낮은 프로필을 유지하는 대신 연금을 받는 것이었어요.

en: that was clearly meant to be for the term of my whole life, not his.
ko: 그 연금은 분명히 내 평생 동안의 것이지 그의 것이 아니었죠.

en: Now he's barely cold and Cookie turns off the bloody tap.
ko: 이제 그는 겨우 차가워졌고 쿠키는 그 끔찍한 돈줄을 끊었어요.

en: How dare she?
Oh, you don't know that it was her. Of course it was her.
ko: 아, 그녀가 그랬다는 걸 모르겠군요. 물론 그녀가 그랬죠.

en: And don't call her that.
Why not? She's fat, common and looks like a cook.
ko: 왜 안 되죠? 그녀는 뚱뚱하고 평범하며 요리사처럼 생겼어요.

en: Did they offer any justification?
That it would appear insensitive for a member of the extended royal family
ko: 왕실의 확장 가족 구성원이 보상을 받고 사치스럽게 사는 것은

en: to be seen to be rewarded and live in luxury.
Extended royal family?
I was the most senior member of that family, the king.
ko: 나는 그 가족의 가장 고위 구성원, 왕이었어요.

en: Now we barely make ends meet.
ko: 이제 우리는 겨우 생계를 유지하고 있어요.

en: Every day is a struggle.
You live in great style from what I've heard.
Perhaps you should take a leaf out of your late brother's book.
ko: 아마도 고인의 형의 방식을 배워야 할 것 같아요.

en: He was frugal, you know.
He was born frugal in every department.
